title: Gentle Tender Croatian Potato Casserole
description: A malty, tender, and kid-friendly Croatian dish featuring russet potato and cure, gluten-free-friendly and perfect for a weeknight dinner. This casserole is made with simple ingredients and is easy to prepare.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the sliced potatoes and chopped onion.
In a large skillet, cook the cure over medium heat until crispy.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked cure and garlic, malty beer, olive oil, salt, and black pepper.
Grease a 9x13 inch baking dish with olive oil.
Create a layer of potatoes in the baking dish, followed by a layer of the cure mixture.
Repeat the layers until all ingredients are used, ending with a layer of potatoes on top.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 45 minutes.
Remove the foil and bake for an additional 20 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender.
